changes.description: New module: label propagation community detection with CommunityInfo/CommunityDetectionResult dataclasses and detect_communities() function
Added communities() method to ContextGraph, imported and exported CommunityDetectionResult
Added graph-communities CLI subcommand with --repo, --min-size, --json flags
8 tests for community detection: dataclass fields, empty graph, single component, disconnected components, deterministic output, min_size filter, edge persistence
3 tests for ContextGraph.communities(): result type, empty graph, min_size filtering
5 tests for graph-communities CLI: help, empty repo, connected files, JSON output, min-size filter
